characters.name: Agent 411
characters.description: Agent 411is a one time character inYou Only Scare Twice.He is a spy, and a parody of James Bond 007.

characters.description: Angelica PicklesCharacteristicsGenderFemale ♀Age3-4Personal StatusRelative(s)Tommy Pickles(cousin)MediaFirst Appearance"Tommy's First Birthday"Voice ActorCheryl ChaseAngelica Picklesis the main antagonist fromRugrats, who appears in that show's crossover episode withAaahh!!! Real Monsters, "Ghost Story". She isTommy Pickles'cousin. Angelica hasn't appeared in any episodes ofAaahh!!! Real Monsters, but did appear in an episode ofRugratswhich three of the monsters appeared inGhost Story.

characters.name: Bappy
characters.description: BappyCharacteristicsSpeciesMonsterGenderFemale ♀Professional StatusOccupation(s)StudentMediaFirst Appearance"The Switching Hour"Voice ActorMarcia StrassmanBappyis a monster student atThe Monster Academy. Bappy is a purple monster with a large nose and long curly antennae with black tips. She wears a sleeveless dark teal dress with a large pocket on the front and black heels. S02E01aSpontaneously Combustible: Bappy is among the students panicking aboutIckis' combustibility. (First speaking appearance.)

characters.name: Belch Monsters
characters.description: Belch Monstersare monsters who work inThe Monster Academy, the serve the function of a class bell by loudly belching. Snorched If You Do, Snorched If You Don't: A grey bipedal belch monster signals the beginning of class. Old Monster: A purple hexapod belch monster appears.

characters.name: Blib
characters.description: Blibis a fish/porcupine/hedgehog-like monster who goes to the Monster Academy. He was previouslyKrumm's friend, and is currently his enemy. He is room mates withSnav, a brown-colored monster with horns. Originally, Blib was colored green. He had a brown flap on his back and black eyes. He has many teeth. He also has two arms and two legs. Later in the series, though, he was colored turquoise and his black eyes were changed to white with black pupils.

characters.name: Bonsty
characters.description: Abonstyis a monster child at the toddler stage. They start out as cocoon-like blobs, then turn into bonsties, or toddlers. Bonsties attempt to eat everything in sight until they have been bonsties for over 24 hours. They are also known to enjoy live monsters rather than inanimate objects but will settle for things besides than other monsters. ﻿A bonsty is a monster toddler. Bonsties rarely appear in the Aaahh!!! Real Monsters television series and only make two appearances on the show. However, both appearances focus on the bonsties, giving them a slightly higher role than that of cameos and minor characters.

characters.name: Borl
characters.description: Borlis a young monster currently attending theMonster Academy. He has one eye, and two horns on top of his head. The character has appeared in many episodes ofAaahh!!! Real Monsters, though he is normally only shown as a background character with no lines. Borl is a pink attendant of theMonster Academywith one eye and two horns. The character is a minor character in theAaahh!!! Real Monsterstelevision series, and rarely ever speaks. He has two uvulas in his mouth for an unknown reason. The character is one ofthe Gromble's many students at the Academy.

characters.name: Bradley
characters.description: BradleyInformationHomeNew York CityCharacteristicsGenderMale ♂PronounsHe/HimPersonal StatusStatusAliveFriend(s)IckisEnemy(s)Ickis (formerly)MediaFirst Appearance"Monsters, Get Real!"Last Appearance"Into the Woods"Voice ActorBrett AlexanderBradleyis a human boy that befriendedIckisand is one of the human friends that Ickis has. He seems to be around the age of 10-12. Bradley and Ickis had a rocky start, but later became friends. Bradley rescues Ickis from Simon in "Simon Strikes Back." In "Into the Woods," the two help each other out. Ickis needs to scare some humans, and Bradley is going on a camping trip where he is being bullied, so Ickis scares the kids who are bullying Bradley.

characters.name: Chomble
characters.description: ChombleInformationFull NameChombleCharacteristicsSpeciesMonsterGenderMale ♂Personal StatusRelative(s)Mama Gromble(maternal grandmother)Unnamed MotherUnnamed FatherGromble(maternal uncle)Bomble(maternal half-brother)MediaOnly Appearance"Oblina and the Three Humans"Voice ActorCarlos AlazraquiChombleisGromble'syoung nephew. He cries almost all of the time. He is shown to only stop crying when he is told a story and is very young. He is very quiet and appears timid. Chomble only makes one appearance of the TV series. Chomble is an infant monster who only appears in the episodeOblina and the Three Humans. He seems to have inherited his uncle's red lips and has four legs, a common trait in his family as both his uncle, the Gromble andMama Gromblehave. He does also have the family nose, but his is smaller and stubber. He wears a small green belt, similar to his uncle's. He is a light shade of purple or a mix of purple/blue with black spots. It's not known if he inherited it from his mother and/or father. He acts as a main character in the episode, though is a minor character in the "Aaahh!!! Real Monsters"TV series overall.

characters.name: Chuckie Finster
characters.description: Chuckie FinsterInformationFull NameCharles Crandall Finster, JrCharacteristicsGenderMale ♂MediaFirst Appearance"Tommy's First Birthday"Charles "Chuckie" Crandall Finster, Jr.is a main character fromRugrats. Chuckie is the group scaredy-cat. Loud noises, dark corners, and Angelica make Chuckie want to run and hide. Whenever the babies are on the verge of a potential misadventure, Chuckie is the voice of reason. Though it's an argument he loses every time, he never stays behind. With his big glasses and untied laces, he stumbles after the others, refusing to ditch his friends. Chuckie is a tan color. He has red hair and purple glasses. His shirt is light blue with saturn on it. He has green pants.

characters.name: Dietrich DuChamp
characters.description: Dietrich DuChampis a famous fashion designer. He's rude, deceitful, pushy, greedy, self-absorbed, materlistic, eccentric, and vain. He was seen in two episodes: "Amulet of Enfarg" and "The Lips Have It". In "Amulet of Enfarg" Dietrich is shown to have speak with an obviously fake European accent and was very suspicous that others knew some of his "features" were fake like his contacts and cheek bones. During a scare,Ickis dropsthe Gromble's amulet and loses it where Dietrich's fashion show is being held.

characters.name: Dizzle
characters.description: DizzleCharacteristicsSpeciesMonsterGenderFemale ♀Professional StatusAffiliation(s)The Monster AcademyOccupation(s)StudentPersonal StatusFriend(s)OblinaHairyetteHorrificaOckaIckisKrummMediaFirst Appearance"The Switching Hour"Last Appearance"Rookie Monsters"Voice ActorCynthia MannDizzleis a crab-like female monster child and attendant of theMonster Academy, and a very minor character, though she appears to be the secondary female character, the primary beingOblina. She is friends withOblinaand many other female monsters. Willing to helpKrummwin his affection, she will do almost anything for him. She has a big crush onIckis, and considers him a "big scary monster". ﻿Dizzle is a friend ofOblinaand one of theGromble's many students. She is a major character in the series and appears in many episodes of "Aaahh!!! Real Monsters", though she only plays a major role in two episodes. Dizzle often only appears as a background character or minor character with few, if any, lines. Dizzle is mostly a tan color. She has teal hair, six legs, and two white eyes with black pupils. Dizzle's lips are red. The character has six magenta high-heel shoes on each of her six legs. The character wears a purple skirt.

characters.name: Dr. Buzz Kut
characters.description: Dr. Buzz KutInformationFull NameBuzz KutCharacteristicsSpeciesMonsterGenderMale ♂Professional StatusAffiliation(s)MASAOccupation(s)ScientistMediaFirst AppearanceMonster Who Came In From the ColdLast AppearanceInternal AffairsVoice ActorEd WinterDr. Buzz Kutworks at MASA, and works to provide nuanced technology for monsters to better study the human world undetected. Dr. Buzz Kut resembles a giant beetle. He is a pudgy monster with blue skin, dark green facial hair, pink eyes and lavender lips. His eyelids wrap around his eyes and he wears a labcoat. Buzz Kut first appeared when The Gromble assigned a special test to his class. He brought Buzz Kut in from Cape Cannerval to test out the new human suit with his best student, Oblina. In his next appearance,I Heard the Snorch Call My Name, he gave The Snorch a voice box by request. He appears again inInternal Affairswhen he found out about a parasite ravaging inside Oblina.

characters.name: Dr. Evil
characters.description: Dr. EvilisAgent 411's nemesis inYou Only Scare Twice.He is not to be confused with the villain of the same name from theAustin Powersfilm series.

characters.name: Dr. Myron C. Luxor
characters.description: Dr. Myron C. Luxoris a human egyptologist who after seeingKrumm's eyes stuck inKatana's head believed that he has brought the mummy back to life, considering himself "The most worthy and god-like human." Dr. Luxor appears inCurse of Katana.

characters.name: Dr. Sy Napse
characters.description: Dr. Sy NapseCharacteristicsGenderMale ♂Age50s-70sPronounsHe/HimLike(s)Collecting BrainsProfessional StatusOccupation(s)Doctor/ScientistPersonal StatusEnemy(s)OblinaIckisKrummMediaOnly Appearance"Who'll Stop the Brain?"Voice ActorKelly ConnellDr. Sy Napseis a brain-obsessed doctor and is self-appointed as "The Brain King". Dr. Sy Napse is psychotic in his profession of brain transplants and is always up for capturing wayward brains. His tone of voice is rather unnerved and he dreams of a world where brains rule the Earth. His hair is huge and fluffy and brown and his teeth are uneven. He has a big, hairy chin and small glasses. He wears a puffy lab coat and blue jeans. His shoes are brown with red socks underneath.

characters.name: Ellis Robinson
characters.description: Ellis Robinsonis an elderly blind African American blues musician who lives in an abandoned building and befriendedIckis. Upon first meeting him, Ickis is defensive, but quickly warms up to him. Ickis later rescues him and defends him against the construction workers who try to tear down the apartment building that he lives in. He lets Ickis vent to him about his struggles at school, and gets him to sing with him to release some of his stress and woes. He also gives Ickis a harmonica. Ellis appears inMonster Blues, where he befriendsIckisafter he wanders into the condemned building that Ellis has been living in. As Ellis is blind, he doesn't believe thatIckisis amonster; however, he realized it at the end of the episode, and it didn't change his feeling aboutIckis.

characters.description: Exposia VertovCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemale ♀Professional StatusOccupation(s)ReporterMediaFirst AppearanceCurse of KatanaLast AppearanceWalk Like a ManVoice ActorLisa RaggioExposia Vertovis aHumannewspaper reporter. Curse of Katana: Exposia is among the news reporters and authorities present at Dr. Luxor's press conference. Monsters Are Real: Exposia inadvertently photographsIckis.
